maxSize.markdownDescription:
Max number of objects to place in a group

Sets the maximum number of objects to place under one group before starting a new group. Set 0 to unlimited. (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: 20000)

flushTimeout.markdownDescription:
Interval to flush a pending TenXObjects group

Sets the max interval after which to flush pending TenXObjects into the pipeline. This option provides a timeout period to flush the current group head and composed  TenXObjects into the pipeline for aggregation, filtering, and encoding to output. (Default: 5sec)

expressions.markdownDescription:
JavaScript expressions TenXObject instance/group must evaluate as truthy against to be set as group head

Specifies a list of JavaScript expressions that must all evaluate as truthy for the target TenXObject to be classified as [group head](https://doc.log10x.com/run/transform/group/#group-heads).  For example, the [group initializer](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/group/) module calculates a [TenxTemplate variable](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXTemplate.set) to determine whether instances of a target `TenXTemplate` represent group heads based on a number of heuristic indicators and sets the calculated field name (e.g., `GroupTemplate.isGroup`) holding the resulting value into this array.   Using TenXTemplate variables allows for computing this state once for all instances of a target event.

filters.markdownDescription:
JavaScript expressions TenXObject instance/group must evaluate as truthy against

Specifies a list of JavaScript expressions that must all evaluate as truthy for the target object/group to be part of a sequence aggregated/written to output.  To learn more see [group filters](https://doc.log10x.com/run/transform/group/#group-filters).

async.markdownDescription:
Group TenXObjects in a dedicated thread

Specifies whether to perform TenXObject grouping logic in a dedicated thread (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)
